user_query: Can you fetch the WHOIS data for the domain example.com using the Bulk WHOIS API? Additionally, perform a DNS lookup for example.com to retrieve its A, NS, and MX records.

TaskList.description: Fetch WHOIS data for the domain example.com using the Bulk WHOIS API.
Perform a DNS lookup for the domain example.com to retrieve its A, NS, and MX records.
